question: Based on the site visits area chart from 2018 to 2022, which statement is most accurate?

options.A: Visits in the final year were the same as in 2021.
options.C: Visits in 2019 were the highest among all years.
options.D: It is unclear whether the final year has the same number of visits as the previous year because the top of the chart is clipped.

explanation: The visible y-range is set below the maximum value, so the top bar is truncated and looks identical.
